title: crepidomanes latifrons
intro: Crepidomanes latifrons, also known as the broad-fronded crepidomanes, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Crepidomanes latifrons include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are said to help alleviate symptoms of fever, headache, and respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in herbal supplements and capsules.
